title: lotodes testariae
side_effects: Lotodes testariae can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and diarrhea. In severe cases, it can cause vomiting, stomach ulcers, and even kidney damage. Long-term misuse of the plant may also lead to respiratory problems, headaches, and dizziness. Additionally, improper use of Lotodes testariae may cause interactions with other medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
